# Spans

on how to make extension types for pandas

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/DeanLight/spannerflow/blob/main/spannerflow/span.py#L19"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### small_hash

>  small_hash (txt, length=6)

\*A function that returns a small hash of a string

Args: txt (*type*): string to hash length (int, optional): length of
hash. Defaults to 6.

Returns: *type*: *description*\*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/DeanLight/spannerflow/blob/main/spannerflow/span.py#L51"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### get_span_repr_format

>  get_span_repr_format ()

\*Returns the span representation format.

Returns: (the span representation format, the number of characters to
display in the span text)\*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/DeanLight/spannerflow/blob/main/spannerflow/span.py#L36"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### set_span_repr_format

>  set_span_repr_format (format=None, head:int|None=None)

\*Sets the representation format for spans and the number of characters
to display in the span text.

Parameters: format (str, optional): The representation format for spans.
Defaults to None. head (int, optional): The number of characters to
display in the span text. Defaults to None.\*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/DeanLight/spannerflow/blob/main/spannerflow/span.py#L234"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### ie

>  ie (s:__main__.Span)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/DeanLight/spannerflow/blob/main/spannerflow/span.py#L70"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### Span

>  Span (doc, start=None, end=None, name=None, from_registry:bool=False,
>            doc_start:int=0, doc_end:int|None=None)

\*All the operations on a read-only sequence.

Concrete subclasses must override **new** or **init**, **getitem**, and
**len**.\*

``` python
assert Span("aa", 0, 2) == "aa"
```

``` python
doc = "world"
df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        [Span("hello", 0, 5), 1],
        [Span(doc, 0, 5), 2],
        [Span(doc, 0, 5), 3],
    ],
    columns=["span", "num"],
)
df
```

``` python
doc = "world"
df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        ["hello", 1],
        ["world", 2],
        ["world", 3],
    ],
    columns=["span", "num"],
)
df
```

``` python
string = "hello stranger"
short_string = "hi"
```

``` python
s = Span(string, 0, len(string), name="doc")
display(s)  # type: ignore
```

    [@doc,0,14) "hello stra..."

``` python
pd.DataFrame({"span": [s]})
```

``` python
df = pd.DataFrame({"span": [s]}).map(repr)
df
```

``` python
s2 = Span(short_string)
display(s2)  # type: ignore
```

    [@c22b5f,0,2) "hi"

``` python
assert s == "hello stranger"
assert s[0:5] == "hello"
assert not s == s[0:5]
assert f"{s[0:5].as_str()} darkness" == "hello darkness"
assert s[0:5][1:4] == "ell"
```
